chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1747 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections. 2.For orders on CMA 7719/2019 3.For hearing of main case 17-03-2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General. **** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received. This petition pertaining to year 2019 was lastly it was fixed in Court on 26.12.2020. Thereafter, no efforts were made to have the matter fixed in Court, which reflects that the petitioner and his counsel are not interested in the proceeding of this matter. Accordingly, instant petition along with listed application(s) is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
